ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2002 Continued To Sep-18-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearances, Plaintiff's counsel, Robert Tayac is sanctioned $250.00 payable within fifteen days by 8/7/02 to the court. Osc continued to 9/25/02 at 1:30 p.m. for entry of proof of service, or to obtain answer from or enter default. Osc to plaintiff's counsel.
